haram.title: Masu Addini Biyu
haram.full: Masjid al-Haram shine cibiyar addini a cikin Alkur'ani, ana gudanar da ayyuka masu tsarki da yawa. Ƙofar Alkawari tana nan a tsakiyar Masu Addini Biyu, wanda shi ne mausammi na Musulunci.

hira.title: Tumafufin Hira
hira.full: Tumafufi a saman Dutsen An-Nur wanda yake a faɗi na Gabas na Masu Addini Biyu. Annabi Muhammad ﷺ yana bauta a nan kafin ya karɓi wahi, Jibril AS ya saukar da aya na farko na Alkur'ani Mai Tsarki a nan.

thawr.title: Tumafufin Thawr
thawr.full: Tumafufi a saman Dutsen Thawr a karkara na Kudancin Makkah. Annabi Muhammad ﷺ da abokinsa Abu Bakr sun boye a nan na tsakanin rana uku a lokacin Hijira zuwa Madinah, an cece su lokacin da gurgu ya gina gangara a bakin tumafufin.

arafat.title: Yankin Arafat
arafat.full: Yanki mai faɗi kusan kilomita 20 a Gabas na Makkah inda Alhajai ke tattara a 9 na watan Dhul Hijjah. A tsakiyarsa akwai Dutsen Arafat inda Annabi ﷺ ya yi khutba na ƙarshe.

mina.title: Yankin Mina
mina.full: Yankin hamada kusan kilomita 5 a Gabas na Makkah, yana tsakanin Makkah da Arafat. Ana san shi da muhimmancinsa a cikin alummomin Alhajji inda Alhajai ke ci gaba da Rana Tashriq kuma suna jawo kwanuka.

muzdalifah.title: Muzdalifah
muzdalifah.full: Yanki a tsakanin Arafat da Mina inda Alhajai ke bacci na dare na 10 na watan Dhul Hijjah suna tattara kukan don jawo Jamarat a Mina.

namirah.title: Masjid Namirah
namirah.full: Babban Masjid a Arafat an gina shi a wurin da Annabi ﷺ ya yi salla a Rana Arafah, inda Imamu ke bayyana khutba na sallar Dhuhr da Asr a 9 na watan Dhul Hijjah.

khayf.title: Masjid Khayf
khayf.full: Masjid a Mina inda a bisa wa gargajiya manabi talatin suka yi salla, kuma shi ne ɗaya daga cikin masu ta-addini da suka fi tsufa a yankin Makkah.

birthplace.title: Wurin Haihuwar Annabi
birthplace.full: Wurin a Makkah inda Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya haihu, wanda yanzu ana san shi da ɗakin karatu da Ma'aikatar Awqaf ke gudanarwa.

jin_mosque.title: Masjid na Jinn
jin_mosque.full: Masjid a Makkah yana cikin yanki da ake kira Al-Ji'ranah, inda Surat Al-Jinn ta sauka kuma ƙungiyar Jinn ta yi 'yakin Annabi Muhammad ﷺ.

nabawi.title: Masjid na Nabii ﷺ
nabawi.full: Na biyu masu tsarki a addinin Islam suna a Madinah. Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya gina shi bayan Hijira, masjid yana ƙunshe da kaburinsa mai tsarki, Raudha ash-Shareefah da minbari. Masjid ya fadada a tarihi, musamman a lokacin Uwakilin Sultan Abdul Hamid II.

baqi.title: Kaburuwar Al-Baqi
baqi.full: Kaburuwar da ta fi muhimmanci a Madinah, tana da suna Jannat al-Baqi. Wurin bacci na Khulafa Rashiidin huɗu (Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman da Husain), dubban Sahaba, kuma matan Annabi ﷺ da iyalansa.

quba.title: Masjid Quba
quba.full: Farkon Masjid da Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya gina bayan Hijira zuwa Madinah a rana ta farko da ya iso. Salla a nan tana da darajar Umrah guda  bisa ga Hadisin Mai Tsarki.

uhud.title: Dutsen Uhud
uhud.full: Wurin Taikin Uhud da ya faru a shekara ta uku na Hijira, kuma kaburin martyrs 70 na Musulunci ciki har da Hamza bin Abdul Muttalib, leon na Allah da kuma rane Annabi ﷺ.

qiblatayn.title: Masjid na Qiblatayn
qiblatayn.full: Masjid inda umarni ta Allah ta sauka don canza Qibla daga Jerusalem zuwa Kaaba mai tsarki a shekara ta biyu na Hijira, farkon Masjid da aka gina a Madinah bayan Masjid Quba.

sabah.title: Masu Addini Biyu (7)
sabah.full: ƙungiyar masu addini masu ƙanƙanta a tarihi a Madinah an gina su a wurare inda jihadiyar Musulunta ta tsaya a Madinah a lokacin Taikin Khandaq (Al-Ahzab).

khandaq.title: Taikin Khandaq
khandaq.full: Yanki a kusa da Dutsen Sal' inda Musulunta suka koyar don kare Madinah, bisa shawarar Salman Al-Farisi a lokacin Taikin Khandaq.

ghamamah.title: Masjid Ghamamah
ghamamah.full: Masjid a tarihi a Madinah inda Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya yi addu'a don ruwa kuma saman ya bayar masa duwatsu.

ijabah.title: Masjid Ijabah
ijabah.full: Masjid a Madinah inda Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya yi addu'a kuma Allah ya karɓe wasu addu'oinsa na Ummah, masjid mai albarka da ma'ana musamman.

miqat.title: Miqat
miqat.full: Miqat na farko ga Alhajai daga Madinah don Hajj ko Umrah, inda suke shiga halin Ihram kuma suna sanya tufafin Ihram.

jummah.title: Masjid Aljum'a
jummah.full: Wurin da Annabi Muhammad ﷺ ya jagoranta farkon Sallar Aljum'a a Islam bayan ya tafi daga Quba zuwa Madinah.

ambariyah.title: Masjid Ambariyah
ambariyah.full: Masjid kyau a Madinah tare da fasahar Ottoman ta musamman, yana kusa da tashar tarin tsohon Hejaz, ana ƙididdige shi ɗaya daga cikin gadon fasahar Ottoman a Madinah.
